creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 223798
v1

"git diff 1.03.0..1.05.2 Quake/Makefile" suggests there's no need to adjust games/vkquake/Makefile

- Builds fine on 11.4/12.2/14.0 aarch64/amd64/i386 and with non-default (inversed) options
- Runs fine on 11.4 i386 and 14.0 amd64 under Wayland and X11

Disclaimer: I don't use this port but it's handy to test Vulkan in SDL sometimes.
